fields.title: Brief task title

rules: Don't add single-session tasks (those go in today.md)
Don't add high-level goals (those go in goals.md)
Remind user about tasks stale >14 days

tasks.title: Charades code cleanup pass
tasks.context: Navigation dead code cleared in S31: removed `predefined-menu-controls.ts`, `getNextMenuModeFocus`, dead state in `CharadesMenuContent`, duplicate `isTypingTarget`. Remaining cleanup: dead presenter/runtime leftovers after recent refactors, and oversized files in results/playboard.
tasks.next_action: Remove dead presenter/runtime leftovers next, then split the remaining oversized Charades files only where responsibilities are still mixed.

tasks.title: Codenames pool manager polish and browser validation
tasks.context: Persistent non-repeating words are implemented for Tajniacy with per-category history, active-pool blocking below 25 fresh words, shared pool-manager modal reuse, and per-category resets from the setup modal. Code-level checks and package builds pass. The remaining work is UX polish in the modal/setup flow and a deliberate browser verification pass for the exhausted-pool flow.
tasks.next_action: Run a visible browser pass on the Tajniacy setup modal and pool manager, then polish remaining copy/layout issues discovered there.
tasks.blocker: Existing Tajniacy e2e/setup-opening issue: after clicking `Zagraj teraz`, Playwright does not reliably see the setup dialog, which blocks stable browser verification in the current automated flow.

tasks.title: Charades modal parity browser validation
tasks.context: Shared modal theming/hover pass and Charades pause-confirm parity are implemented. Code-level checks pass for host controls and runtime navigation, but a full browser runtime pass of Kalambury modals was not completed in this session because the local verification stack was inconsistent: `localhost:3000` hydrates the hub correctly, `127.0.0.1:3000` shows broken HMR behavior, and the recommended `dev-hub-dev.mjs` path was blocked by an unrelated auth page type error.
tasks.next_action: Re-run the Kalambury host + presenter browser flow on a stable local stack and verify pause/settings/reconnect/runtime modals end-to-end.
tasks.blocker: Local stack instability across hub dev/HMR and presenter connection prevented an honest end-to-end runtime modal pass in this session.
